name: Returning Starknife
description:
This returning throwing knife is specially made for Lyrune-Quah hunters, and its blade is carved with constellations.

Ribbon Wrap r (concentrate)

Frequency once per hour

Trigger You deal damage to a target with the starknife

Effect Silver ribbons of starlight entangle the target, dealing ] damage. This is silver damage for the purposes of weaknesses, resistances, and the like. The target must attempt a save.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature takes half damage and is Clumsy 1.

Failure The creature takes full damage and is for 1 round.

Critical Failure The creature takes full damage and is with an DC of 24.
